description: A formal Incident Response Escalation Policy has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/alarm_escalation_policy.txt. Read the policy document carefully and configure the four required alarm escalation rules in ManageEngine OpManager to implement the tiered incident response workflow. Each rule must have the exact name, trigger severity, escalation time, and target email address specified in the policy. Log in to OpManager at http://localhost:8060 using credentials admin / Admin@123.
